nodes.name: 喀斯喀特山脉
nodes.summary: 喀斯喀特山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括西點林鴞、Bullock's oriole，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bullock's oriole
nodes.summary: Bullock's oriole（Bullock's oriole，学名 Icterus bullockiorum），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于喀斯喀特山脉。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Bullock's orioles are native to western North America, though they are sometimes found as vagrants in the eastern half of the continent. During the breeding season, they are found as far west as the eastern foothills of the Cascade Range
